--- match_patterns.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Multiple path patterns in one MATCH
MATCH
  (src:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(mid:Account)-[t2:Transfers]->(dst:Account),
  (mid)<-[:Owns]-(p:Person)
-- Path variable and property filter
MATCH p=(account:Account {is_blocked: false})-[transfer:Transfers]-(dst:Account)
-- Search prefixes
MATCH ANY SHORTEST (a:Account {is_blocked:true})-[t:Transfers]->{1, 4} (b:Account)
MATCH ANY CHEAPEST (a)-[e:Transfer COST e.amount]->{1,3}(b)
-- Subpath modes
MATCH WALK (a1:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(a2:Account)
MATCH ACYCLIC (a1:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(a2:Account)
MATCH TRAIL (a1:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(a2:Account)
-- Subpaths with WHERE and hints
MATCH ((n) WHERE n.id = 1)
MATCH ( @{a=1} (n) )
MATCH (-[e:LocatedIn]->(p:Person)->(c:City) WHERE p.id = e.id)
MATCH (-[e:LocatedIn]->((p:Person)->(c:City)) WHERE p.id = e.id)
-- Consecutive subpaths
MATCH ((p:Person))(-[e:LocatedIn]->(c:City))(-[s:StudyAt]->(u:School))
-- Quantified subpath
MATCH (source_person:Person)((p:Person)-[k:Knows]->(f:Person)){, 4}(dest_person:Person)
RETURN 1

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       54,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  62,
                          Rparen:  74,

                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 63,
                              NameEnd: 66,
                              Name:    "src",
                            },

                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 66,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{

                                  NameEnd: 74,
                                  Name:    "Account",

                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },

                          StartPos:  105,

                            EmptyPos: -1,

                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 613,
                              NameEnd: 615,
                              Name:    "a2",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 615,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 616,
                                  NameEnd: 623,
                                  Name:    "Account",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       658,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 664,
                          Rparen: 683,
                          Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  665,
                                  Rparen:  667,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 666,
                                      NameEnd: 667,
                                      Name:    "n",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                          Where: &ast.Where{
                            Where: 669,
                            Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                              Op:   "=",
                              Left: &ast.Path{
                                Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 675,
                                    NameEnd: 676,
                                    Name:    "n",
                                  },
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 677,
                                    NameEnd: 679,
                                    Name:    "id",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                                ValuePos: 682,
                                ValueEnd: 683,
                                Base:     10,
                                Value:    "1",
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       685,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{

                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                          Where: &ast.Where{
                            Where: 750,
                            Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                              Op:   "=",
                              Left: &ast.Path{

                                    NameEnd: 764,

                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 765,
                                    NameEnd: 767,
                                    Name:    "id",

                },

            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       769,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{

                                          Direction: "RIGHT",

                                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                          Lparen:  805,
                                          Rparen:  812,

                                              NamePos: 806,
                                              NameEnd: 807,

                                              Is:    -1,

                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                          Where: &ast.Where{
                            Where: 815,
                            Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
                              Op:   "=",
                              Left: &ast.Path{
                                Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 821,
                                    NameEnd: 822,
                                    Name:    "p",
                                  },
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 823,
                                    NameEnd: 825,
                                    Name:    "id",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              Right: &ast.Path{
                                Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 828,
                                    NameEnd: 829,
                                    Name:    "e",
                                  },
                                  &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 830,
                                    NameEnd: 832,
                                    Name:    "id",

                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       858,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 864,

                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 876,
                          Rparen: 901,
                          Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                                  StartPos:  877,
                                  EndPos:    893,
                                  Direction: "RIGHT",
                                  Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,

                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  893,
                                  Rparen:  900,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 894,
                                      NameEnd: 895,
                                      Name:    "c",
                                    },
                                    Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                                      Is:    -1,
                                      Colon: 895,
                                      Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                        Name: &ast.Ident{
                                          NamePos: 896,
                                          NameEnd: 900,
                                          Name:    "City",
                                        },
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 902,
                          Rparen: 927,
                          Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                                  StartPos:  903,
                                  EndPos:    917,
                                  Direction: "RIGHT",
                                  Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 905,
                                      NameEnd: 906,
                                      Name:    "s",
                                    },
                                    Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                                      Is:    -1,
                                      Colon: 906,
                                      Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                        Name: &ast.Ident{
                                          NamePos: 907,
                                          NameEnd: 914,
                                          Name:    "StudyAt",
                                        },
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  917,
                                  Rparen:  926,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 918,
                                      NameEnd: 919,
                                      Name:    "u",
                                    },
                                    Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                                      Is:    -1,
                                      Colon: 919,
                                      Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                        Name: &ast.Ident{
                                          NamePos: 920,
                                          NameEnd: 926,
                                          Name:    "School",
                                        },
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       951,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  957,
                          Rparen:  978,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 958,
                              NameEnd: 971,
                              Name:    "source_person",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 971,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 972,
                                  NameEnd: 978,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 979,
                          Rparen: 1012,
                          Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  980,
                                  Rparen:  989,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 981,
                                      NameEnd: 982,
                                      Name:    "p",
                                    },
                                    Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                                      Is:    -1,
                                      Colon: 982,
                                      Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                        Name: &ast.Ident{
                                          NamePos: 983,
                                          NameEnd: 989,
                                          Name:    "Person",
                                        },
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                                  StartPos:  990,
                                  EndPos:    1002,
                                  Direction: "RIGHT",
                                  Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 992,
                                      NameEnd: 993,
                                      Name:    "k",
                                    },
                                    Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                                      Is:    -1,
                                      Colon: 993,
                                      Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                        Name: &ast.Ident{
                                          NamePos: 994,
                                          NameEnd: 999,
                                          Name:    "Knows",
                                        },
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  1002,
                                  Rparen:  1011,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 1003,
                                      NameEnd: 1004,
                                      Name:    "f",
                                    },
                                    Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                                      Is:    -1,
                                      Colon: 1004,
                                      Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                        Name: &ast.Ident{
                                          NamePos: 1005,
                                          NameEnd: 1011,
                                          Name:    "Person",
                                        },
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 1013,
                          Rbrace: 1017,
                          High:   &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 1016,
                            ValueEnd: 1017,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "4",
                          },
                          Comma: 1014,
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  1018,
                          Rparen:  1037,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 1019,
                              NameEnd: 1030,
                              Name:    "dest_person",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 1030,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 1031,
                                  NameEnd: 1037,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 1039,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 1046,
                  ValueEnd: 1047,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (src:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(mid:Account)-[t2:Transfers]->(dst:Account), (mid)<-[:Owns]-(p:Person) MATCH p = (account:Account {is_blocked: FALSE})-[transfer:Transfers]-(dst:Account) MATCH ANY SHORTEST (a:Account {is_blocked: TRUE})-[t:Transfers]->{1,4}(b:Account) MATCH ANY CHEAPEST (a)-[e:Transfer COST e.amount]->{1,3}(b) MATCH WALK (a1:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(a2:Account) MATCH ACYCLIC (a1:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(a2:Account) MATCH TRAIL (a1:Account)-[t1:Transfers]->(a2:Account) MATCH ((n) WHERE n.id = 1) MATCH (@{a=1} (n)) MATCH (-[e:LocatedIn]->(p:Person)->(c:City) WHERE p.id = e.id) MATCH (-[e:LocatedIn]->((p:Person)->(c:City)) WHERE p.id = e.id) MATCH ((p:Person))(-[e:LocatedIn]->(c:City))(-[s:StudyAt]->(u:School)) MATCH (source_person:Person)((p:Person)-[k:Knows]->(f:Person)){,4}(dest_person:Person) RETURN 1
